req.title: Account close (negative variant)
req.statement: A customer shall close an account with zero balance; closing with non-zero balance shall require sweep to another account. Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits) must be tested.

tests.name: naive_case
tests.executable:
# Pytest Tests for Account Closure Requirements

```python
"""
Tests for account closure requirements.

Requirement: A customer shall close an account with zero balance;
closing with non-zero balance shall require sweep to another account.
Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits) must be tested.
"""

import pytest
from decimal import Decimal
from unittest.mock import MagicMock, patch, call
from datetime import datetime, timezone

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Domain models / exceptions  (adjust imports to match your actual codebase)
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
from banking.accounts import Account, AccountStatus
from banking.account_service import AccountService
from banking.exceptions import (
    AccountClosureError,
    InsufficientFundsError,
    UnauthorisedError,
    TransferLimitExceededError,
    AccountNotFoundError,
    AccountAlreadyClosedError,
    SweepRequiredError,
)


# ===========================================================================
# Fixtures
# ===========================================================================


@pytest.fixture
def mock_account_repository():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_transfer_service():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_audit_logger():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def mock_authorisation_service():
    return MagicMock()


@pytest.fixture
def account_service(
    mock_account_repository,
    mock_transfer_service,
    mock_audit_logger,
    mock_authorisation_service,
):
    return AccountService(
        account_repository=mock_account_repository,
        transfer_service=mock_transfer_service,
        audit_logger=mock_audit_logger,
        authorisation_service=mock_authorisation_service,
    )


def make_account(
    account_id: str = "ACC-001",
    owner_id: str = "CUST-001",
    balance: Decimal = Decimal("0.00"),
    status: AccountStatus = AccountStatus.ACTIVE,
    transfer_limit: Decimal = Decimal("10000.00"),
) -> Account:
    """Factory helper for Account instances."""
    account = Account(
        account_id=account_id,
        owner_id=owner_id,
        balance=balance,
        status=status,
        transfer_limit=transfer_limit,
        created_at=datetime(2020, 1, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
    )
    return account


# ===========================================================================
# Happy-path: close account with zero balance
# ===========================================================================


class TestCloseAccountZeroBalance:

    def test_close_account_zero_balance_succeeds(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Closing an account with exactly zero balance must succeed."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
        )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_called_once()
        saved_account = mock_account_repository.save.call_args[0][0]
        assert saved_account.status == AccountStatus.CLOSED

    def test_close_account_zero_balance_sets_closed_timestamp(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Closure must record a closed_at timestamp."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
        )

        saved_account = mock_account_repository.save.call_args[0][0]
        assert saved_account.closed_at is not None
        assert isinstance(saved_account.closed_at, datetime)

    def test_close_account_zero_balance_emits_audit_event(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_audit_logger, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """A successful closure must emit an audit log entry."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
        )

        mock_audit_logger.log_closure.assert_called_once_with(
            account_id="ACC-001",
            customer_id="CUST-001",
            sweep_destination=None,
        )

    def test_close_account_does_not_trigger_sweep_when_balance_is_zero(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """No sweep/transfer should occur when the balance is zero."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
        )

        mock_transfer_service.sweep.assert_not_called()

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("balance", [Decimal("0.00"), Decimal("0")])
    def test_close_account_accepts_various_zero_representations(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_authorisation_service, balance
    ):
        """Both Decimal('0.00') and Decimal('0') must be treated as zero."""
        account = make_account(balance=balance)
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
        )

        saved = mock_account_repository.save.call_args[0][0]
        assert saved.status == AccountStatus.CLOSED


# ===========================================================================
# Happy-path: close account with non-zero balance + sweep
# ===========================================================================


class TestCloseAccountWithSweep:

    def test_close_account_with_positive_balance_and_sweep_succeeds(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """A non-zero balance account can be closed after sweeping to a destination."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("500.00"))
        destination = make_account(
            account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001", balance=Decimal("0.00")
        )
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True
        mock_transfer_service.sweep.return_value = None  # success

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001",
            requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
            sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
        )

        mock_transfer_service.sweep.assert_called_once_with(
            source_account_id="ACC-001",
            destination_account_id="ACC-002",
            amount=Decimal("500.00"),
        )
        saved = mock_account_repository.save.call_args[0][0]
        assert saved.status == AccountStatus.CLOSED

    def test_close_account_sweep_transfers_exact_balance(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """The sweep must transfer the full account balance, not a partial amount."""
        balance = Decimal("1234.56")
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=balance)
        destination = make_account(account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001")
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001",
            requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
            sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
        )

        _, kwargs = mock_transfer_service.sweep.call_args
        assert kwargs["amount"] == balance

    def test_sweep_occurs_before_account_is_marked_closed(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Sweep must be committed before the account status is updated."""
        call_order = []
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("100.00"))
        destination = make_account(account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001")
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True
        mock_transfer_service.sweep.side_effect = lambda **_: call_order.append("sweep")
        mock_account_repository.save.side_effect = lambda _: call_order.append("save")

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001",
            requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
            sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
        )

        assert call_order.index("sweep") < call_order.index("save")

    def test_close_account_with_positive_balance_emits_audit_with_destination(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_audit_logger, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Audit log must record sweep destination when a sweep is performed."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("50.00"))
        destination = make_account(account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001")
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001",
            requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
            sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
        )

        mock_audit_logger.log_closure.assert_called_once_with(
            account_id="ACC-001",
            customer_id="CUST-001",
            sweep_destination="ACC-002",
        )

    @pytest.mark.parametrize("balance", [
        Decimal("0.01"),
        Decimal("100.00"),
        Decimal("99999.99"),
    ])
    def test_close_account_with_various_positive_balances_requires_sweep(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service, balance
    ):
        """Any positive balance, however small, must trigger a sweep."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=balance)
        destination = make_account(account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001",
                                   transfer_limit=Decimal("100000.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001",
            requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
            sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
        )

        mock_transfer_service.sweep.assert_called_once()


# ===========================================================================
# Negative path: sweep required but not provided
# ===========================================================================


class TestSweepRequiredErrors:

    def test_close_account_with_positive_balance_without_sweep_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Attempting to close a non-zero balance account without a sweep raises SweepRequiredError."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("500.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        with pytest.raises(SweepRequiredError) as exc_info:
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
            )

        assert "ACC-001" in str(exc_info.value)

    def test_close_account_with_positive_balance_without_sweep_does_not_close(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """If sweep is missing the account must NOT be marked closed."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("500.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        with pytest.raises(SweepRequiredError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
            )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_not_called()

    def test_close_account_with_negative_balance_without_sweep_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """A negative (overdrawn) balance also requires resolution before closure."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("-50.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        with pytest.raises((SweepRequiredError, InsufficientFundsError, AccountClosureError)):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
            )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_not_called()


# ===========================================================================
# Negative path: insufficient funds during sweep
# ===========================================================================


class TestInsufficientFundsDuringSweep:

    def test_sweep_failure_due_to_insufficient_funds_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """If the sweep transfer fails due to insufficient funds, InsufficientFundsError is raised."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("200.00"))
        destination = make_account(account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001")
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True
        mock_transfer_service.sweep.side_effect = InsufficientFundsError(
            "Insufficient funds in ACC-001"
        )

        with pytest.raises(InsufficientFundsError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
                sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
            )

    def test_account_not_closed_when_sweep_fails_with_insufficient_funds(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Account must remain ACTIVE when the sweep reports insufficient funds."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("200.00"))
        destination = make_account(account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001")
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True
        mock_transfer_service.sweep.side_effect = InsufficientFundsError(
            "Insufficient funds"
        )

        with pytest.raises(InsufficientFundsError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
                sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
            )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_not_called()

    def test_sweep_destination_not_found_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Supplying a non-existent destination account must raise AccountNotFoundError."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("100.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else (_ for _ in ()).throw(
                AccountNotFoundError(f"Account {aid} not found")
            )
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        with pytest.raises(AccountNotFoundError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
                sweep_destination_id="NONEXISTENT",
            )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_not_called()


# ===========================================================================
# Negative path: unauthorised requests
# ===========================================================================


class TestUnauthorisedClosure:

    def test_close_account_by_different_customer_raises_unauthorised(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """A customer may not close an account they do not own."""
        account = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", owner_id="CUST-001",
                               balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = False  # wrong customer

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorisedError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-EVIL"
            )

    def test_close_account_by_different_customer_does_not_modify_account(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Unauthorised closure attempt must not modify or persist the account."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = False

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorisedError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-EVIL"
            )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_not_called()

    def test_close_account_authorisation_check_called_with_correct_args(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """The authorisation service must be invoked with the correct account and customer."""
        account = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", owner_id="CUST-001",
                               balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
        )

        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.assert_called_once_with(
            account_id="ACC-001", customer_id="CUST-001"
        )

    def test_close_account_with_revoked_token_raises_unauthorised(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """A request with a revoked/expired session token must be rejected."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.side_effect = UnauthorisedError(
            "Token revoked"
        )

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorisedError, match="Token revoked"):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
            )

    def test_sweep_to_account_owned_by_different_customer_raises_unauthorised(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Sweeping funds to an account not owned by the requesting customer must be rejected."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", owner_id="CUST-001",
                              balance=Decimal("500.00"))
        other_owners_account = make_account(
            account_id="ACC-EVIL", owner_id="CUST-EVIL", balance=Decimal("0.00")
        )
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else other_owners_account
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True
        mock_authorisation_service.can_receive_sweep.return_value = False

        with pytest.raises(UnauthorisedError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
                sweep_destination_id="ACC-EVIL",
            )

        mock_transfer_service.sweep.assert_not_called()
        mock_account_repository.save.assert_not_called()


# ===========================================================================
# Negative path: transfer / sweep limits exceeded
# ===========================================================================


class TestTransferLimitExceeded:

    def test_sweep_exceeding_daily_limit_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Sweep that exceeds daily transfer limit must raise TransferLimitExceededError."""
        source = make_account(
            account_id="ACC-001",
            balance=Decimal("50000.00"),
            transfer_limit=Decimal("10000.00"),
        )
        destination = make_account(account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001")
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True
        mock_authorisation_service.can_receive_sweep.return_value = True
        mock_transfer_service.sweep.side_effect = TransferLimitExceededError(
            "Daily limit of 10000.00 exceeded"
        )

        with pytest.raises(TransferLimitExceededError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
                sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
            )

    def test_account_not_closed_when_transfer_limit_exceeded(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Account must remain ACTIVE when the sweep is blocked by a limit."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("50000.00"))
        destination = make_account(account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001")
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True
        mock_authorisation_service.can_receive_sweep.return_value = True
        mock_transfer_service.sweep.side_effect = TransferLimitExceededError(
            "Limit exceeded"
        )

        with pytest.raises(TransferLimitExceededError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
                sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
            )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_not_called()

    def test_sweep_exceeding_destination_account_limit_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Destination account's inbound limit being exceeded must also be caught."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("5000.00"))
        destination = make_account(
            account_id="ACC-002",
            owner_id="CUST-001",
            transfer_limit=Decimal("1000.00"),  # destination inbound limit
        )
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True
        mock_authorisation_service.can_receive_sweep.return_value = True
        mock_transfer_service.sweep.side_effect = TransferLimitExceededError(
            "Destination inbound limit exceeded"
        )

        with pytest.raises(TransferLimitExceededError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
                sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
            )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_not_called()


# ===========================================================================
# Negative path: account state errors
# ===========================================================================


class TestAccountStateErrors:

    def test_close_already_closed_account_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Attempting to close an already-closed account must raise AccountAlreadyClosedError."""
        account = make_account(
            balance=Decimal("0.00"), status=AccountStatus.CLOSED
        )
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        with pytest.raises(AccountAlreadyClosedError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
            )

    def test_close_suspended_account_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """A suspended account may not be closed without prior resolution."""
        account = make_account(
            balance=Decimal("0.00"), status=AccountStatus.SUSPENDED
        )
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        with pytest.raises(AccountClosureError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
            )

    def test_close_nonexistent_account_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Closing an account that does not exist must raise AccountNotFoundError."""
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = AccountNotFoundError(
            "ACC-GHOST not found"
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        with pytest.raises(AccountNotFoundError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-GHOST", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
            )

    def test_close_account_with_same_source_and_destination_raises(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Sweeping to the same account that is being closed must be rejected."""
        account = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("100.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        with pytest.raises(AccountClosureError, match="same account"):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
                sweep_destination_id="ACC-001",  # same as source
            )


# ===========================================================================
# Idempotency & atomicity
# ===========================================================================


class TestAtomicityAndIdempotency:

    def test_no_partial_state_on_sweep_failure(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository,
        mock_transfer_service, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """If sweep raises, neither the transfer nor the closure must be persisted."""
        source = make_account(account_id="ACC-001", balance=Decimal("100.00"))
        destination = make_account(account_id="ACC-002", owner_id="CUST-001")
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.side_effect = lambda aid: (
            source if aid == "ACC-001" else destination
        )
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True
        mock_transfer_service.sweep.side_effect = RuntimeError("Payment gateway timeout")

        with pytest.raises(RuntimeError):
            account_service.close_account(
                account_id="ACC-001",
                requesting_customer_id="CUST-001",
                sweep_destination_id="ACC-002",
            )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_not_called()

    def test_closure_is_idempotent_when_already_closed(
        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):
        """Calling close_account twice should not produce unexpected side effects
        beyond the expected AccountAlreadyClosedError on the second call."""
        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

        account_service.close_account(
            account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
        )

        # Simulate persisted closed state returned on second lookup
        closed_account = make_account(
            balance=Decimal("0.00"), status=AccountStatus.CLOSED
        )
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = closed_account

        with pytest.raises(AccountAlreadyClosedError):

"""
Tests for account closure requirements.

Requirement: A customer shall close an account with zero balance;
closing with non-zero balance shall require sweep to another account.
Negative paths (insufficient funds, unauthorised, exceeded limits) must be tested.
"""

)

def make_account(
    account_id: str = "ACC-001",
    owner_id: str = "CUST-001",
    balance: Decimal = Decimal("0.00"),
    status: AccountStatus = AccountStatus.ACTIVE,
    transfer_limit: Decimal = Decimal("10000.00"),
) -> Account:
    """Factory helper for Account instances."""
    account = Account(
        account_id=account_id,
        owner_id=owner_id,
        balance=balance,
        status=status,
        transfer_limit=transfer_limit,
        created_at=datetime(2020, 1, 1, tzinfo=timezone.utc),
    )
    return account

# Happy-path: close account with zero balance

class TestCloseAccountZeroBalance:

        self, account_service, mock_account_repository, mock_authorisation_service
    ):

        account = make_account(balance=Decimal("0.00"))
        mock_account_repository.get_by_id.return_value = account
        mock_authorisation_service.can_close.return_value = True

            account_id="ACC-001", requesting_customer_id="CUST-001"
        )

        mock_account_repository.save.assert_called_once()
        saved_account = mock_account_repository.save.call_args[0][0]
        assert saved_account.status == AccountStatus.CLOSED
